title: ndeimler99/TArPON pipeline parameters
description: A pipeline to Analyze Telomeric sequences from Nanopore Sequencing

Input_Output.title: Input and Output Parameters
Input_Output.description: Mandatory Parameters to set up the Analysis

input.title: Input
input.description: Sequencing Files - Either a file directory or a single file - BAM, fastq, or fastq.gz accepted

fast_basecalled.title: Fast Basecalled Data
fast_basecalled.description: Check this box and provide a pod5 directory if the data is basecalled using a fast model

pod5_dir.title: Pod5 Directory
pod5_dir.description: A directory where the raw pod5 files are stored - this is required when specifying if the data was fast basecalled or if the user is interested in modifications

run_name.title: Run Name
run_name.description: Title of Sequencing Run for Generation of Output Files

sample_name.title: Sample Name
sample_name.description: Name of sample when sequencing contains only one sample

sample_file.title: Sample File
sample_file.description: CSV file containing sample names and barcodes to use for demultiplexing. If no capture probe sequence is provided the barcodes will also be used for determing the end of the telomere

capture_probe_sequence.title: Telomere Capture Sequence
capture_probe_sequence.description: Provide the first 12 nucleotides of the capture sequence that would appear on the G strand telomeric sequences

outdir.title: Output Directory
outdir.description: This should be a path to a directory to store the output data. The parent directory should exist. If the main directory does not exist it will be created

overwrite_outdir.title: Overwrite Output Directory?
overwrite_outdir.description: Set this to true if the output directory already exists but you would like to overwrite the data

repeat.title: Telomeric Repeat Sequence (G-Strand)
repeat.description: Please supply the telomeric sequence found on the G strand, for examples and most vertebrata, GGTTAG

minimum_telo_reads_per_sample.title: Minimum Number of Telomeres Per Sample
minimum_telo_reads_per_sample.description: Samples will be marked as failed if minimum number of telomeres is below this threshold

c_strand_only.title: C Strand Analysis Only
c_strand_only.description: If the data was collected in such a way that only C strand telomeric sequences should be expected (i.e. ONT protocol), select this box

repeat_count.title: Repeat Number for Putative Identification
repeat_count.description: Number of repeats a read must contain to be considered putatively telomeric

reverse_complement_threshold.title: Reverse Complement Threshold
reverse_complement_threshold.description: Percentage of telomeric repeats must be greater than this value to be classified as C strand. If the percentage is less than 1 minus this value, the read is classified as C strand. Anthing greater than 1-value but less than value is removed from analysis

Capture_Probe_Demux_Filter.title: Capture Probe Identification, Demultiplexing, and Subtelomeric Filtering Parameters
Capture_Probe_Demux_Filter.description: Advanced Parameters relating to the identification of capture probe sequences, demultiplexing samples, and filtering telomeric reads by their subtelomere

capture_probe_sequence_errors.title: Allowed Errors in Capture Probe Sequence
capture_probe_sequence_errors.description: Number of allowed errors to be found in the capture probe sequence. The capture probe sequence wil only be found after ten telomeric repeats. It is recomended this value be 2 for a 12 nucleotide capture probe sequence. For each additional 8bp, the number of errors should be increased by 1

barcode_errors.title: Allowed Errors in Barcode Sequences
barcode_errors.description: Number of allowed errors in the barcode sequence. It is recomended this value by 1/8 the length of the barcode assuming the hamming distance between barcodes is greater than 1/8 the barcode length

capture_probe_overhang_length.title: Capture Probe Overhang Length
capture_probe_overhang_length.description: Number of telomeric nucleotides in duplex overhang. If the teloemre originates from the C strand these repeats will be removed from the end of the telomere as they would have originated from the capture probe, not the biological telomere

min_subtelo_length.title: Minimum Subtelomere Length
min_subtelo_length.description: Minimum Read Lenth Before VRR region Telomeric Start Site to Ensure sequencing completely through telomeres

subtelo_threshold.title: Maximum Telomeric Percentage
subtelo_threshold.description: Maximum percentage of one nucleotide substitutions of telomeric sequences found within min_subtelo_length before read does not pass filtering criteria

Telo_Start.title: Determining Telomere Start Position
Telo_Start.description: Advanced Options regarding Telomere Start Position Analysis and Filtering

sliding_window_size.title: Sliding Window Size
sliding_window_size.description: Length of the sliding window analyzed for the identification of telomeric start

sliding_window_interval.title: Sliding Window Interval
sliding_window_interval.description: How many base pairs will the sliding window jump each time rather than operating on a nucleotide by nucleotide slide

upper_threshold.title: Upper Telomeric Threshold
upper_threshold.description: The percentage of which a sliding window must consist of one nucleotide repeat variations for the telomere to start. Must be a value between 0 and 1

lower_threshold.title: Lower Telomeric Threshold
lower_threshold.description: Sliding window one nucleotide variation percentage must not drop below this value after upper threshold has been surpassed.

consecutive_threshold.title: Consecutive Sliding Windows
consecutive_threshold.description: Number of consecutive sliding windows below the lower threshold for telomere start site to be unidentified

telomeric_repeat_percentage.title: Mimumum Telomere Percentage
telomeric_repeat_percentage.description: Additional filtering step that removes telomeres that consist of less than this percentage one nucleotide variant repeats from the VRR start to the capture probe sequence

pretelomeric_repeat_percentage.title: Pre-telomeric Repeat Percentage
pretelomeric_repeat_percentage.description: Maximum Percentage of telomere+1N repeats in pretelo_start nucleotides prior to VRR-start site

pretelo_start.title: Pretelomeric Start Distance
pretelo_start.description: Distance before VRR-region start site to search for telomere+1N repeats relating to Pre-Telomeric Repeat Percentage

minimum_telomere_length.title: Minimum Telomere Length
minimum_telomere_length.description: Minimum length of a telomere to be included in the analysis

Advanced_Options.title: Advanced Options
Advanced_Options.description: Advanced Options regarding Mutant and Other Analyses

remove_wd.title: Remove Work Directory
remove_wd.description: If true, working directory is removed on run complete. This prevents build up of unnecesary files but prevents -resume from being used

detailed_stats.title: Detailed Plots
detailed_stats.description: Additional sets of plots analysing telomeric reads are created. See README for more details

strand_comparison.title: Strand Comparison
strand_comparison.description: Generate Plots Directly comparing C to G strand results

indiv_read_plots.title: Individual Real Plots
indiv_read_plots.description: Generate Plots showing individual reads and telomeric start identification

restriction_digest_analysis.title: Restrction Enzymes
restriction_digest_analysis.description: Provide a list of comma seperated restriction enzyme sites for an analysis of digestion completion

mutant.title: Mutant Repeat of Interest
mutant.description: Telomeric Mutation of Interest - See Manual for more details
